channel.desc: On Pluto TV Drama, serious film is taken... seriously. Some of best cinematic dramas of all time can be experienced here, in all their angsty, gritty, sometimes heartbreaking, sometimes heartwarming glory.
Pluto TV's BET Cinema channel celebrates Black storytelling and artistry with unforgettable movies, iconic performances, independent spotlights, and award-winning documentaries.
Black Cultureâs funniest characters will have you rolling on the floor. Pluto TV's BET Comedy Movies is your ticket to a continuous stream of hilarious films, available 24/7.

BET Visionaries is where the works of talented writers, directors, and creative artists of color are showcased and celebrated. Watch top Hollywood hits and the latest independent features from Black creators every day on Pluto TV.

The coolest decade in film history now has itâs own dedicated channel on Pluto TV. Pump up your sneakers and strap on your fanny pack for your favorite blockbuster hits and indie darlings, 24 hours a day.

Hollywood changed forever in the 1970s when the studio system collapsed and renegade filmmakers took over. Now relive the award-winning classics and drive-in theater favorites of the era on Pluto TVâs 70s Cinema.

Pluto TVâs BET Throwback takes you to a time when the boombox, beatbox, and the freshest kicks meant you were super fly! Revisit the best comedy series of the era with our favorite Black actors, comics, and creators, streaming 24 hours a day.
Heavy On The Fun - Featuring The Latest BET x Tyler Perry Comedy Shows: From House Of Payne To Assisted Living

Two funny families are moving in. Join Grandma Hattie down at the Love Train Diner on Tyler Perry's "Love Thy Neighbor," then gather with the Kingston-Persons bunch on "Are We There Yet?" anytime on Pluto TV's Black Family Sitcoms.

MTVâs Wild 'N Out channel on Pluto TV gives you the best of the hit comedy gameshow, one battle at a time. Join Nick Cannon and his hilarious comedic sidekicks as they throw down their sharpest, wittiest and quickest jokes all improvised on the spot.

We laughed âtil we cried as our iconic Black entertainers took the sitcom world by storm, took off our hats as timeless movies finally featured people that looked like us, and variety shows showcased us to the world. Relive it all with BET Classics
Heavy On The Suspense - Featuring The Latest BET x Tyler Perry Drama Shows: From Sistas To The Oval
EBONY TV Drama features award winning series that celebrate the richness and diversity of Black culture.
Canât get enough high-impact drama? Watch more primetime hits 24/7 right here.

Guys being guys. That's what you'll get 24 hours a day on Spike Pluto TV. Whether they are at work, at play, in the garage, or out on the open range, you'll always find compelling true stories and dynamic characters right here.

Ink runs deep with Black Ink Crew. Watch the OG Crew take New Yorkâs tattoo scene by storm, and 9Mag bring more tats and more drama to The Windy City. Black Ink Crew New York and Black Ink Crew Chicago â united in ink on Pluto TV.

From the Big Apple to The A â classic episodes of VH1âs Love & Hip Hop, Love & Hip Hop New York and Love & Hip Hop Atlanta come together on Pluto TV. Watch hip hop artists live, learn, and love as they navigate the music industry.

Kick back and enjoy the best of Black Hollywood in movies and TV! Featuring hundreds of hours of beloved films and familiar TV series, this channel is sure to have everything youâve been looking for in one place, 24 hours a day.

ION is the destination for your favorite binge-worthy dramas! Featuring critically-acclaimed shows, including âNCIS,â âFBI,â and âChicago Fire,â IONâs action-packed schedule promises to keep you entertained all day long.

Bounce XL is a dynamic extension of one of TVâs hottest brands. Stream the best in Black television, including original programming and specials, scripted sitcoms and dramas, and everything that makes Bounce XL a must-watch destination.
Take a dive into MTVâs classic hit programming on MTV Pluto, featuring the best of MTVâs reality & dating shows.
Come through with Logoâs hit comedy, reality and dramatic shows featuring the best LGBTQ programming around. You better werk!
ET is the streaming home for Entertainment Tonight, the global leader in entertainment and pop culture news, exclusive celebrity interviews, behind the scenes access, and red carpet coverage.

programme.title: Cadillac Records

programme.desc: The competition reaches epic proportions as the top 3 queens compete in their final challenge starring in the music video for RuPaul's hit Glamazon. With choreographer Candis Cayne.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Wigs fly as the queens return to discuss the drama of the season.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race

programme.title: Best of Shakur Stevenson
programme.desc: All the best fight moments of Shakur Stevenson.

programme.title: Best of Teofimo Lopez
programme.desc: All the best fight moments of Teofimo "The Takeover" Lopez.

programme.title: Best of Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: All the best fight moments of Thomas "The Hitman" Hearns.

programme.title: Best of Xander Zayas
programme.desc: All the best fight moments of Xander Zayas.

programme.title: Brandon Rios vs Miguel Acosta
programme.desc: On February 26th, 2011, Brandon Rios fought Miguel Acosta for the WBA World Lightweight Title at the Palms in Las Vegas. In a great back-and-forth fight, Brandon Rios knocked down Acosta hard, stopping him in the 10th round.

programme.title: Brandon Rios vs Miguel Acosta
programme.desc: On February 26th, 2011, Brandon Rios fought Miguel Acosta for the WBA World Lightweight Title at the Palms in Las Vegas. In a great back-and-forth fight, Brandon Rios knocked down Acosta hard, stopping him in the 10th round.

programme.title: Brandon Rios vs Mike Alvarado 1
programme.desc: On October 13th, 2012, Brandon Rios fought Mike Alvarado for the WBO Latino Super Lightweight Title in Carson, California. Showing his quickness and agility, Rios put on a show with a 7th round TKO victory.

programme.title: Chris Eubank vs Nigel Benn 1
programme.desc: On November 18th, 1990, Chris Eubank fought Nigel Benn for the WBO Middleweight Title at the Resorts World Arena in Birmingham, UK. Eubank's constant pressure on Benn and powerful punching led him to stop Benn in the ninth round.

programme.title: Devin Haney vs Rafael Vazquez
programme.desc: On April 9th, 2016 Devin Haney and Rafael Vazquez fought eachother at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went 4 rounds and ended in a unanimous decision win for Haney.

programme.title: Diego Corrales vs Jose Luis Castillo
programme.desc: On May 7th, 2005 Diego Corrales faced Jose Luis Castillo for WBC and WBO World Lightweight titles at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas in a bout that went 10 rounds that ended in technical knockout giving the win to Corrales.

programme.title: Donald Curry vs Milton McCrory
programme.desc: On December 6th, 1985, Donald Curry fought Milton McCrory for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Welterweight Titles in Las Vegas. Putting on the pressure early, Donald Curry came out firing, knocking out McCrory in the second round.

programme.title: Eddie Mustafa Muhammad vs Marvin Johnson
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1980 Eddie Mustafa Muhammad fought Marvin Johnson for the WBA World Light Heavyweight title that went 11 out of 15 rounds and ended by technical knockout giving the victory to Muhammad.

programme.title: Efe Ajagba vs Brian Howard
programme.desc: On April 10th, 2021 Efe Ajagba faced Brian Howard at the Osage Casino in Tulsa, Ok. With the fight ending by knockout in the third round securing the win for Ajagba.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Chris Diaz
programme.desc: On April 24th, 2021 Emanuel Navarrete and Chris Diaz fought for the WBO World Featherweight title at the Silver Spurs Arena, Kissimmee that resulted with a technical knockout in the 12th round securing Navarretes victory.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Chris Diaz
programme.desc: On April 24th, 2021 Emanuel Navarrete and Chris Diaz fought for the WBO World Featherweight title at the Silver Spurs Arena, Kissimmee that resulted with a technical knockout in the 12th round securing Navarretes victory.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Isaac Dogboe 1
programme.desc: On December 8th, 2018, Emanuel Navarrete fought Isaac Dogboe for the WBO World Super Bantamweight Title at the Madison Square Garden Theater in New York. Navarrete was the more aggressive fighter in the match, earning the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Isaac Dogboe 2
programme.desc: On May 11th, 2019, Emanuel Navarrete rematched Isaac Dogboe for the WBO World Super Bantamweight Title in Tucson. Navarrete put on an impressive performance, scoring two knockdowns and stopping Dogboe in the final round.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Joet Gonzalez
programme.desc: On October 15th, 2021, Emanuel Navarrete fought Joet Gonzalez for the WBO World Featherweight Title at Pechanga Arena in San Diego. In an incredible battle, Emanuel Navarrete pulled out an impressive unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs In Jin Chi
programme.desc: On July 28th, 2001, Erik Morales fought In Jin Chi for the WBC Featherweight Title at the Staples Center in Los Angeles. Defending his title, Erik Morales put on the pressure to do enough to get the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera
programme.desc: On February 19th, 2000 Erik Morales fought Marco Antonio Barrera for WBC and WBO World Super Bantamweight titles at Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas which ended in a split decision victory for Morales.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera II
programme.desc: On June 22nd, 2002 Erik Morales faced Marco Antonio Barrera for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBC world featherweight title in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera II
programme.desc: On June 22nd, 2002 Erik Morales faced Marco Antonio Barrera for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBC world featherweight title in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera III
programme.desc: On November 27th, 2004 Erik Morales and Marco Antonio Barrera faced eachother for the third and final time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On April 19th, 1991, Evander Holyfield fought George Foreman for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Heavyweight Titles in Atlantic City. Both fighters displayed incredible skill and resilience, but Holyfield ultimately emerged victorious after 12 rounds.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs Larry Holmes
programme.desc: On June 19th, 1992 Evander Holyfield battles Larry Holmes for the IBF, WBA, and WBC World Heavyweight title they battled at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas the bout went a full twelve rounds and ended in a unanimous decision win for Holyfield.

programme.title: Felix Trinidad vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On September 18th, 1999 Felix Trinidad and Oscar De La Hoya faced eachother for the IBF and WBC World welterweight title at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas that ended in a majority decision win for Trinidad.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Jose Luis Castillo 1
programme.desc: On April 20th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather fought Jose Luis Castillo for the first time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayeather vs Jose Luis Castillo 2
programme.desc: On December 7th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather faced Jose Luis Castillo for a second time at Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles resulting in a unamimous decision win for Mayweather.
